#AiArtCommunity #digitalart #AiArt #aidigitalart #speedracer #slow #parody #remixratpack #surrealart #3D #design #INSTAGRAM #classic #cool #portrait #openai #AiCommunity #AiArtChallenge #SynthArt #CreativeAi #Ai #AiArtwork #qp prompt in ALT

embed.alt: A 15-second high-energy anime trailer for “Speed Limit Racer”, in the bold retro style of classic Speed Racer, with exaggerated motion lines, dynamic camera angles, and dramatic racing visuals—but the twist is the heroine drives painfully slow. Open with an intense announcer voice and rapid cuts of roaring engines, flashing lights, and her car revving at the starting line, then smash cut to her car moving at a very calm, legal, almost comically slow speed while other hyper-stylized cars blast past her in blurs and streaks. In the final shot, everything goes quiet and minimal as Speed Limit Racer slowly, majestically rolls across the screen from left to right, and the title “SPEED LIMIT RACER” scrolls on just as slowly beneath it, holding for a deadpan comedic finish. Make sure title appears at the end.

A 15-second high-energy anime trailer for “Speed Limit Racer”, in the bold retro style of classic Speed Racer, with exaggerated motion lines, dynamic camera angles, and dramatic racing visuals—but the twist is the heroine drives painfully slow. In the final shot, everything goes quiet and minimal as Speed Limit Racer slowly, majestically rolls across the screen from left to right, and the title “SPEED LIMIT RACER” scrolls on just as slowly beneath it, holding for a deadpan comedic finish. record.text:
I take pictures with my Nothing Phone 2 (a) in HDR.

When I look at those images in my Gallery, they look great, but when I upload them to any social media, they look dull.

Why is it difficult for all social media apps to enable HDR uploads for every phone?

#HDR #Photography #HighDynamicRange

ご主人様、今日も素敵な一日を。
白いエプロン、ふわふわのフリル。
お部屋をきれいに、心を込めて。
お茶を淹れる手のひらは、少しだけドキドキします。

視線が合うと、頬がぽっと赤くなるの。
この気持ち、内緒の小さな宝物です。
お役に立てることが、何よりの喜びだから。
小さなピンクのリボンも、そっと微笑む私と一緒に。

「おかえりなさいませ」
その一言に、全ての想いを込めて。
明日も、ずっと、あなたのそばで。
優しさと、小さな笑顔を届けたいです。
#PixAI #AIart

まぶしいお昼の太陽が海をキラキラ輝かせてる！こんな素敵な日に、私だけの特別な出会いがあったんだ。ほら、見て？手のひらにそっと舞い降りてくれた、光り輝く蝶。まるで夢の中にいるみたいに心が弾むね。波の音も心地よくて、この時間がずっと続けばいいのにって思っちゃうな。
#PixAI #AIart

みんなの心、私が癒してあげるね！このお衣装で、とびっきりの笑顔をプレゼントっ☆

3月4日は【バウムクーヘンの日】だそうです
In Japan, March 4th is "Baumkuchen Day" 

❁ ミーアキャット / Meerkat × AI Creation ❁ 
#AIArt #DigitalArt #Meerkat #ミーアキャット

images.alt:
これはAI生成物です。キッチンカウンターの上に置かれた大きなバームクーヘンで、たくさんの赤ちゃんミーアキャットたちが穴から顔を出したり、外側によじ登ったり、こぼれた生地のくずをもぐもぐ食べたりと、みんな思い思いに楽しんでいます。
This is an AI-generated creation. It depicts many baby meerkats enjoying themselves in their own ways with a large baumkuchen on a kitchen counter—peeking out from the hole, climbing up the sides, and munching on fallen crumbs.

record.text: Yes, successive Conservative and UCP governments have tried to hide their own failures by blaming the federal Liberals. Many have been conned by them.
Most are hard working honest people caring for their families. I can't say that for our UCP governments nor many of the Conservative ones that preceded them.

9/9 Albertans loathe the notion of a provincial sales tax, but a sustainable, made-in-Alberta solution is desperately needed. Future generations are owed that, and much more.

Editorial Board,
The Globe And Mail
www.theglobeandmail.com/gift/4957f4e...
